name: WAFD INC
business: WaFd, Inc. is a bank holding company whose primary business is conducted through its wholly-owned subsidiary, WaFd Bank. The bank provides lending, depository, insurance and other banking services to consumers, small, mid-sized and large businesses, and owners and developers of commercial real estate.
sellsTo: owners and developers of commercial real estate

exposures.sentence: The Bank originates construction loans to finance construction of single-family and multi-family residences as well as commercial properties.
The Company is also engaged in insurance brokerage activities through the Bank’s subsidiary, WaFd Insurance Group, Inc.
In January 2025, the Bank announced its exit from the single-family mortgage lending market, including home equity lines of credit.
risks associated with cybersecurity incidents and threat actors
risks associated with the development and use of artificial intelligence
risks related to the impacts of climate change on our business or reputation
